title: Self-hosted Garage (S3-compatible) as the single unstructured-content sink
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

Per the object-storage research (datadir/research-self-hosted-object-storage.md): MinIO's OSS line is DEAD (repo archived 2026-02-12). Use **Garage** (Deuxfleurs) — 30MB static binary, ~1GB RAM, AGPLv3; its missing S3 features are exactly the ones OpenWPM does not use (write-once, md5-keyed flat namespace). INTEGRATION = ZERO provider code change: S3UnstructuredProvider forwards **kwargs to s3fs.S3FileSystem which accepts endpoint_url. Pumpable: wire crawler.py to select the S3 unstructured provider via an endpoint+bucket env var (mirror the OPENWPM_POSTGRES_URL structured wiring), add a Garage deploy doc, validate end-to-end. Part of #41.
